### Section 1 — Problem / Request

---

### Section 2 — Analysis Summary

**Situation understood:**
```
9arm-skills is a standalone Claude Code plugin repo with 4 active skills
(debug-mantra, post-mortem, scrutinize, management-talk) organized by bucket
folders (engineering/, productivity/) and installed via symlink. DevStarter
ships 41 skills under skills/devstarter-*/ via bash install.sh. User chose
Option C (fork into DevStarter with devstarter- prefix) over symlink-coexist,
sister-plugin, or marketplace-plugin alternatives.
```

**Gap (Add Feature):**
```
DevStarter currently lacks: engineer debug-discipline skill, bug-postmortem
write-up skill, outsider-perspective scrutinize/review skill, engineer→mgmt
translation skill. 9arm-skills provides all four.
```

**Affected area / files:**
```
- skills/devstarter-debug-mantra/SKILL.md           (NEW)
- skills/devstarter-bug-postmortem/SKILL.md         (NEW — renamed to avoid collision)
- skills/devstarter-scrutinize/SKILL.md             (NEW)
- skills/devstarter-management-talk/SKILL.md        (NEW)
- devstarter-menu.md                                (EDIT — register 4 entries)
- VERSION                                            (EDIT — bump to 5.1.0)
- CHANGELOG.md                                      (EDIT — add v5.1.0 entry)
- README.md                                         (EDIT — mention + attribution)
- install.sh                                        (VERIFY — auto-globs skills/)
```

---

### Section 3 — Recommended Approach

**Recommended option from consultation:**
```
Option C — Fork into DevStarter. Copy 4 skill folders, rename with devstarter-
prefix, rename post-mortem → bug-postmortem to avoid collision with existing
devstarter-postmortem (Blameless Incident Post-Mortem). Add Universal Prompt
blocks (v4.7.0 multi-AI Phase 1 parity). Credit 9arm-skills upstream in each
SKILL.md + CHANGELOG.
```

**Why this was recommended:**
```
User explicitly chose C over sister-plugin (B). Trade-off accepted: upstream
drift in exchange for single bash install.sh distribution. All 4 skills are
direct-invoke (no SDLC runbooks needed), so port is mechanical: copy + rewrite
frontmatter name + add Universal Prompt block + attribution.
```

**Estimated effort:** M (2–8h, actual ~45min)

**Risks or caveats:**
```
- Upstream drift — 9arm-skills future updates won't auto-sync
- Naming collision flagged + resolved (post-mortem → bug-postmortem)
- Attribution rot — mitigate with .copied-from metadata or top-of-file credit
```

---

### Section 4 — Acceptance Criteria

**Done when:**
```
Given DevStarter v5.1.0 installed via `bash install.sh`
When  user invokes /devstarter-debug-mantra, /devstarter-bug-postmortem,
      /devstarter-scrutinize, /devstarter-management-talk
Then  each skill loads, no collision with existing /devstarter-postmortem,
      menu lists all 4 new entries, Universal Prompt block present
```

**Regression guard (must still work):**
```
- Existing /devstarter-postmortem (Blameless Incident Post-Mortem) unchanged
- All 41 pre-existing skills still install + invoke
- install.sh exit code 0
```
